article_title: 什么是单体架构？三种类型用 C# 讲清楚
core_theme: 三种单体架构类型的对比——单进程单体、模块化单体和分布式单体（反模式），用 C# 代码展示每种类型并给出适用场景判断
reader_takeaway: 能区分三种单体类型，知道为什么模块化单体是大多数团队的正确默认选择，识别并避开分布式单体反模式
summary_angle: 三种单体形态并排对照——左侧经典单进程（分层），中间模块化（有边界），右侧分布式（打叉反模式）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文类型一章：单进程单体，Controller→Service→Repository 分层架构，一切在一个进程里
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧一个经典三层堆叠方块，层之间直接箭头连接

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文类型二章：模块化单体，每个模块自包含，通过公开 API 交互，IServiceCollection 注册
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间一组有清晰边界的分隔模块方块，模块间仅有管道连接

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文类型三章：分布式单体反模式，服务分离但共享 DbContext，部署协调噩梦
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧一组表面分离但被共享数据层绑在一起的服务方块，带叉号或警告标记

main_metaphor: 三种建筑结构并排——左侧是单栋多层楼（单进程），中间是带防火墙的联排建筑群（模块化），右侧是表面分离但地基连在一起的危楼（分布式反模式）
primary_subject: 三种并排的建筑/结构形态，分别代表三类单体架构
subject_action: 左侧简单堆叠，中间模块化有分隔墙，右侧表面分离但底部共享结构带警告标记
composition: 水平三列并排对照布局
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中；高对比电影风格适合'三种架构对比'的主题，强光与深影强化差异感和判断力
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 先验证'三种结构并排对照 + 分布式反模式标记 + 高对比光影'是否成立
revision_targets: 分布式单体的警示标记是否清晰
高对比光影是否过重导致细节丢失
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover. Theme: three types of monolith architecture compared side by side. Single-process monolith (classic layered), modular monolith (correct default with boundaries), distributed monolith (anti-pattern, crossed out). The reader should immediately see one is the preferred choice and one is a warning.

Summary angle: three architectural forms side by side — left classic single-process layered stack, middle modular with enforced boundaries, right distributed anti-pattern with warning marks.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: left column, a classic three-layer stacked block with direct arrow connections between layers, labeled in Chinese for single-process monolith
- mechanism: middle column, a set of cleanly separated module blocks with pipeline connections only, labeled in Chinese for modular monolith
- contrast: right column, seemingly separate services bound together by a shared data layer underneath, with cross or warning marks, labeled in Chinese for distributed monolith

Main metaphor: three architectural structures side by side — left a single multi-story building, middle connected townhouses with firewalls, right a dangerous structure appearing separate but sharing a cracked foundation.
Subject: three side-by-side architectural forms representing the three monolith types.
Subject action: left simple stack, middle modular with separation walls, right seemingly separate but sharing bottom structure with warning marks.
Composition/framing: horizontal three-column side-by-side comparison layout.
Style/medium: combine isometric conceptual systems scene with high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading. Stylized, polished, editorial. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm gold highlight, deep blue-gray, warning orange-red.
Visible text policy: allow only short Chinese labels for three types. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real UI screenshots, code rain, floating chips, neon backgrounds, cyberpunk purple-blue, HUD overlays.
